title: Spicy Algerian Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: This light and crispy Spicy Algerian Chickpeas dish features gochujang for a spicy kick, ideal as an accompaniment to any meal.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chickpeas and garlic to the pan. Stir-fry for about 3 minutes until they start to crisp up.
Pour in gochujang, followed by lemon juice (about 1 tbsp), cumin, and smoked paprika. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to medium and continue to stir-fry for another minute until everything is coated evenly with the sauce.
Add more oil if needed, then drizzle in remaining lemon juice and toss to coat again.
Taste and adjust seasonings as needed, add parsley at the end for a pop of color and freshness.
